extract: Pachirisu (Japanese: パチリス Pachirisu) is an Electric-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Starly and Munchlax, Pachirisu is one of the three Partner Pokémon of Almia available at the beginning of Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia.
